sections.title: First Meeting
sections.description: What happens the first time someone talks to this agent. The bootstrap message is sent once, then auto-deleted.

fields.label: Enable Bootstrap
fields.help: If enabled, the agent introduces itself on first contact

fields.label: Greeting Message
fields.placeholder:
How should the agent introduce itself?
e.g., Hi! I'm Atlas, your research assistant. I specialize in finding information, analyzing data, and building knowledge graphs.

Tell me about what you're working on, and I'll adapt to help you best.
fields.help: The first message the agent sends

sections.title: Discovery
sections.description: Questions the agent asks to learn about the user during the first conversation.

fields.label: Discovery Questions
default: How would you like me to communicate — formal or casual?
fields.help: Questions asked during first conversation to personalize the experience

fields.label: Auto-delete After First Run
fields.help: Remove the bootstrap file after the first conversation completes
